{{Quote|Stopping isn't hard, stopping gently is.|Bowman York to [[Plat Mallar]]|<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>}}
'''Bowman York''' was [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Grannan]] who served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. He served as [[Plat Mallar]]'s flight instructor on [[Polneye]] until he perished when the world was [[Battle of Polneye|invaded]] by the [[Duskhan League]].
